title: Set up OpenTelemetry distributed tracing in a Next.js App Router project
summary: Install the OTel Node SDK, create instrumentation.ts and instrumentation.node.ts, export traces to a local Jaeger or cloud backend (Honeycomb, Grafana), and add custom spans.
declaration: I will set up OpenTelemetry distributed tracing in this Next.js App Router project using Next.js's built-in instrumentation hook. Traces will be exported via OTLP to a collector of your choice (Jaeger locally, or Honeycomb/Grafana Cloud in production). I will NOT set up logging or metrics by default — ask if you need those. If you prefer a hosted APM like Datadog or Dynatrace, say so before I begin.
